text.title: Usability Testing Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion that references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition triggers?

branch.question: Is a testable prototype or live build reachable?
Is recruitment ≥5 participants per relevant segment?

conclusion.verdict: apply: scenario-based tasks with success criteria; run sessions; compute severity per rubric.
defer or constrain: do not produce cross-segment findings until per-segment n >=5; single-segment is acceptable for severity-1 spot checks.
block: no testable artefact, no observation. Route back to prototyping.
do not apply this methodology in this context; route to the correct one or skip.

text.example: Applies-If holds, prototype reachable, ≥5 per segment → produce plan + script + sessions + severity-rated findings; severity-1 entries human-reviewed before backlog.
